def negative_typevar_defined_without_bound_or_constraints_for_narrow_use():
    rule_id = "typevar_defined_without_bound_or_constraints_for_narrow_use"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "TypeVar defined without a bound or constraints for a generic that is only used with one or two concrete types."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
